bless your chart
  • about

174: Node Graphs

tidygraph
ggraph
Published

February 19, 2026

Load data

Code 
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

clean_cbb_names <- function(team_name) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    team_name %in% c("Florida St.", "Florida State") ~ "Florida State",
    team_name %in% c("N.C. State", "NC State")       ~ "NC State",
    team_name %in% c("Miami FL", "Miami")             ~ "Miami (FL)",
    TRUE ~ team_name
  )
}

# --- Process Data ------------------------------------------------------------

acc_2004_edges <- readr::read_csv("acc_2004.csv") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    t1 = clean_cbb_names(Team),
    t2 = clean_cbb_names(Opp)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(t1 < t2) |>
  dplyr::group_by(t1, t2) |>
  dplyr::summarise(games = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")

acc_2026_edges <- readr::read_csv("acc_2026.csv") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    t1 = clean_cbb_names(team),
    t2 = clean_cbb_names(opp)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(t1 < t2) |>
  dplyr::group_by(t1, t2) |>
  dplyr::summarise(games = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")


# save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}

Node graph

Code 
plot_node_logos <- function(edge_df, line_color_single, line_color_double,
                            logo_width = 0.05) {
  graph  <- tidygraph::as_tbl_graph(edge_df, directed = FALSE)
  layout <- ggraph::create_layout(graph, layout = "circle")
  
  ggraph::ggraph(layout) +
    ggraph::geom_edge_link(
      ggplot2::aes(
        width = factor(games),
        color = factor(games),
        alpha = factor(games)
      ),
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    cbbplotR::geom_cbb_teams(
      data = layout,
      ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y, team = name),
      width = logo_width
    ) +
    ggraph::scale_edge_color_manual(
      values = c("1" = line_color_single, "2" = line_color_double)
    ) +
    ggraph::scale_edge_width_manual(values = c("1" = 0.4, "2" = 2.0)) +
    ggraph::scale_edge_alpha_manual(values = c("1" = 0.25, "2" = 0.85)) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = 0.18)) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = 0.18)) +
    ggplot2::theme_void() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.background  = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin      = ggplot2::margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
    )
}

# --- Generate Plots ----------------------------------------------------------
p1_node <- plot_node_logos(
  acc_2004_edges,
  line_color_single = "#c7e9c0",
  line_color_double = "#31a354"
)

p2_node <- plot_node_logos(
  acc_2026_edges,
  line_color_single = "#fdbe85",
  line_color_double = "#d94701",
)

# --- Panel Titles ------------------------------------------------------------
p1_titled <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(p1_node) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "2003-04: 9 Teams\nRound-robin (play every team twice)",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.97,
    fontface = "plain",
    size = 14,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed"
  )

p2_titled <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(p2_node) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "2025-26: 18 Teams\nOnly play two teams twice",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.97,
    fontface = "plain",
    size = 14,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed"
  )

# --- Side-by-Side Layout ----------------------------------------------------
side_by_side <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p1_titled,
  p2_titled,
  ncol = 2,
  align = "h"
)

final_plot <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
  cowplot::draw_plot(side_by_side, y = 0.03, height = 0.92) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "ACC Regular Season Scheduling Comparison",
    x = 0.5, y = 0.97,
    size = 16,
    fontface = "bold",
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 1,
    color = "black",
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed"
  ) +
  cowplot::draw_label(
    "Data via sports-reference.com | Viz by Chris at Bless your Chart",
    x = 0.5,
    y = 0.01,
    size = 11,
    fontface = "italic",
    fontfamily = "Roboto Condensed",
    color = "gray40",
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "label",
    x = 0.50,
    y = 0.20,
    label = paste0(
      "9 pairs of conference opponents\n",
      "don't play each other:\n\n",
      "Florida State-Louisville\n",
      "Cal-NC State\n",
      "Notre Dame-Wake Forest\n",
      "Stanford-Syracuse\n",
      "Pittsburgh-Virginia Tech\n",
      "Clemson-Virginia\n",
      "Duke-Miami\n",
      "Georgia Tech-SMU\n",
      "Boston College-North Carolina"
    ),
    size = 3.4,
    color = "#333333",
    family = "Roboto Condensed",
    fontface = "plain",
    fill =  "#d94701",
    alpha = 0.4,
    label.padding = ggplot2::unit(6, "pt"),
    label.r = ggplot2::unit(3, "pt"),
    label.size = 0.5,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0.5,
    lineheight = 1.0
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "curve",
    x = 0.50, 
    y = 0.35,
    xend = 0.55, 
    yend = 0.60,
    curvature = -0.3,
    color = "#d94701",
    arrow = ggplot2::arrow(length = grid::unit(2, "mm"))
  )

final_plot
Code 
ggplot2::ggsave(
  "acc_scheduling_comparison.png",
  final_plot,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

ACC Standings table

Code 
acc <- readr::read_csv("acc-standings.csv") |> 
  dplyr::select(-...1)

custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa_conf/500/acc.png'
       style='height: 105px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>ACC standings <br>through February 18 games</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Sorted by overall conference win percentage.<br> Table includes point differentials, home and away records in league play.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

final_tbl <- acc |> 
  dplyr::arrange(-win_pct) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    overall_rec = paste0(wins, "-", loss),
    home_rec = paste0(home_w, "-", home_l),
    away_rec = paste0(away_w, "-", away_l),
  ) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team, include_name = FALSE) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gt::cols_hide(columns = c(wins, loss, home_w, home_l, away_w, away_l)) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_theme_gtutils() |>
  gt::fmt(
    columns = c(pd, home_pd, away_pd),
    fns = function(x) {
      ifelse(x > 0, paste0("+", x), x)
    }
  ) |>
  gt::fmt_number(columns = ends_with("win_pct"), decimals = 3) |>
  gt::fmt_number(columns = ends_with("wp"), decimals = 3) |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(team), align = "center") |>
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = win_pct,
    col2 = overall_rec,
    palette = c("black", "#333333")
  ) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = home_wp,
    col2 = home_rec,
    palette = c("black", "#333333")
  ) |> 
   gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = away_wp,
    col2 = away_rec,
    palette = c("black", "#333333")
  ) |> 
   gt::data_color(
    columns = c(win_pct, home_wp, away_wp),
    direction = c("column"),
    method = c("numeric"),
    palette = c("#d7191c", "#fdae61", 
                "#ffffbf", "#a6d96a", 
                "#1a9641"),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) |> 
   gt::data_color(
    columns = c(pd, home_pd, away_pd),
    direction = c("column"),
    method = c("numeric"),
    palette = c("#d7191c", "#fdae61", 
                "#ffffbf", "#a6d96a", 
                "#1a9641"),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    win_pct = list(heading = "Overall", subtitle = "W-L"),
    pd = list(heading = "+/-", subtitle = "All games"),
    home_wp = list(heading = "Home", subtitle = "W-L"),
    home_pd = list(heading = "+/-", subtitle = "Home games"),
    away_wp = list(heading = "Away", subtitle = "W-L"),
    away_pd = list(heading = "+/-", subtitle = "Away games"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team = "",
  ) |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>Data from barttorvik.com and theme for {gtUtils}<br>
                ACC teams play 14 opponents once, two opponents twice, and one opponent not at all.<br>
                Teams that don't play each other:<br>
                Florida State-Louisville, Cal-NC State, Notre Dame-Wake Forest<br>
                Stanford-Syracuse, Pittsburgh-Virginia Tech, Clemson-Virginia<br>
                Duke-Miami, Georgia Tech-SMU, Boston College-North Carolina<br>
                <hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your chart | February 19, 2026</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      size = gt::px(10),
      weight = 250
    )
  ) |>
    gt::tab_style(
    style = list(gt::cell_borders(
      sides = c("left", "right", "top", "bottom"),
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(2)  # Make it thicker than internal borders
    )),
    locations = list(
      gt::cells_body(),
      gt::cells_column_labels(),
      gt::cells_row_groups()
    )
  )  |> 
   
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
    )),
    locations = gt::cells_body(
      rows = gt::everything(),
      columns = gt::everything()
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(650))



gt_save_crop(final_tbl,
             file = "acc_tbl.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "#FFFDF5")


final_tbl

through February 18 games Sorted by overall conference win percentage.
Table includes point differentials, home and away records in league play.

Data from barttorvik.com and theme for {gtUtils}
ACC teams play 14 opponents once, two opponents twice, and one opponent not at all.
Teams that don't play each other:
Florida State-Louisville, Cal-NC State, Notre Dame-Wake Forest
Stanford-Syracuse, Pittsburgh-Virginia Tech, Clemson-Virginia
Duke-Miami, Georgia Tech-SMU, Boston College-North Carolina
Table by Chris at Bless your chart | February 19, 2026
